mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HCNC.HTML_P1(P1, P2, P3) VALUES (#{P1}, #{P2}, #{P3})
mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT, 0 AS CHK FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1
AND BOARD_NO=#{boardNo}
AND ( TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') OR CONT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') )
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')
AND CONT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT, 1 AS CHK FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_NO=#{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HCNC.HCNC_BOARD(TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER) VALUES (#{TITLE}, #{CONT}, #{WRITER}, #{MODIFIER})
mapper.update: UPDATE HCNC.HCNC_BOARD SET TITLE=#{TITLE}, CONT=#{CONT}, MODIFIER=#{MODIFIER}, MOD_DT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE BOARD_NO=#{BOARD_NO}
